title: Structs, Methods, Method Sets, Embedding, and Composition · Language Lens: Composition Invariants
summary: A job scheduler needs explicit domain records, validated transitions, method behavior, and composition without accidental promotion. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go composition invariants increment in a validated job-domain model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compose small types and constructors so invalid state, ownership, and transitions remain observable and testable.
Use embedding for promotion only after resolving name collisions, initialization, API exposure, and substitution limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
